anatomy.description: Rounded-square wrapper (~120px wide, 96px tall). Gray neutral background. Carries padding and vertical flex layout.
Stacked grid that overlays the icon on top of the icon-form shape. The icon-form (diamond or circle) acts as a colored background tile behind the icon.
The decorative shape behind the icon. Two forms supported: diamond (54×54px) and circle/ellipse (48×48px). Carries the category color.
The action icon overlaid on the icon-form. 32×32px for both icon-form types. Centered on the shape.
Text label below the icon-wrapper. Manrope Medium 16px, center-aligned. Can wrap to two lines.

iconForms.name: diamond
iconForms.description: A rotated square (diamond) shape. 54×54px. Icon is 32×32px centered on it (offset: 11px from top-left).

iconForms.name: circle
iconForms.description: A circular ellipse shape. 48×48px. Icon is 32×32px centered on it (offset: 8px from top-left).

sizes.name: default
sizes.note: Single size only. No size variants.

states.name: active
states.trigger: Resting/default state. The button is available and not interacted with.

states.name: pressed
states.trigger: Button is actively tapped or clicked.

stateNote: No hover state. Designed for touch/mobile contexts. State property is named 'active' for the resting state (not 'default').

typography.note: Label can wrap to two lines (e.g., 'Speed enforcement', 'Wrong directions').

usageContext: Map reporting actions (Traffic, Accident, Closure, Speed enforcement, Wrong directions).
Contextual menus with multiple categorized options.
figmaPropNote: The label prop is spelled 'lable' in the Figma component (typo). Normalised to 'label' in all documentation and code.
notes: No size variants — single size only.
The icon-form shape carries the category/action color. The component itself does not own the color — it is set by the icon asset.
